tagged_types.name: USB_Device_Stack
tagged_types.code: type USB_Device_Stack (Max_Classes : Class_Index) is tagged private;

access_types.name: Any_USB_Device_Class
access_types.code: type Any_USB_Device_Class is access all USB_Device_Class'Class;

subprograms.name: Configure
Controller
subprograms.code:
function Controller (This : USB_Device_Stack)
                     return not null Any_USB_Device_Controller

subprograms.name: Fill_Config_Descriptor
subprograms.code:
procedure Fill_Config_Descriptor (This : in out USB_Device_Class;
                                  Data :    out UInt8_Array)

subprograms.name: Get_Class_Info
Initialize
Initialize
Register_Class

documentation.description: Return False if there is no space left to register the class

subprograms.name: Register_String

documentation.returns:
The USB String descriptor must fit in the control buffer,
this is constraint on the length string that can be used
in the device.

subprograms.name: Request_Buffer

documentation.description:
Allocate a buffer for the corresponding End-Point. This buffer should
then be used by the class for IN or OUT transfers depending on the given
EP address.

Return Null_Address if resquest fails (e.g. no memory available).

subprograms.name: Request_Endpoint

documentation.description: Allocate a non-control End-Point to be used by the class

subprograms.name: Setup_Read_Request
Setup_Write_Request
Transfer_Complete
